specs.Air Duct: A specially-designed air duct helps the fan generate static pressure and concentrates air flow over the fins.
specs.Finned heatsink: The heatsink fin density is optimized to maximize surface area while maintaining a low-resistance exhaust path.
specs.Custom Delta Superflo Fan: The custom low-noise fan features a high-durability bearing with a 60,000-hour L10* lifespan. * L10 bearing life is a standard metric that specifies the number of hours that 90% of the bearing are expected to continue successfully operating, as a minimum.
specs.Intuitive graphical fan control: Fine-tune individual fans by simply dragging a curve with the mouse.
specs.EZ XMP: Improve DRAM performance with one click.
specs.SATA Information: SATA port details that help easily recognize drive.
specs.Fast Clock Adjustment: Use mouse controls to change the time and date.
specs.Flex key: At its default, the flex key functions as a system reset button, but it can also be easily set to quickly turn Aura lighting on or off, activate Safe Boot or enter the UEFI.
specs.Search function: Quickly and easily find the option or setting you're looking for.
specs.ASUS BIOS profile: Save BIOS settings for migration to a new BIOS version or system.
specs.My Favorites: Quickly discover tuning options and add preferred tools to the list.

specs.Powerful CPU Support: AM5 socket compatibility with Ryzen 7000/8000/9000 series processors.
specs.TDP Range: Supports processors with TDP between 88W and 180W for optimized performance.
specs.Advanced Chipset: Powered by AMD® B850 high-speed chipset for seamless computing.
specs.Memory Flexibility: 2 x U-DIMM DDR5 slots, up to 96GB capacity. Dual-channel support for improved performance. Overclocking support with speeds up to 8000MHz.
specs.Integrated Graphics Support: Shared memory for processors with integrated graphics. 1 x HDMI 1.4 port (up to 4096x2160 @ 30Hz), 1 x DP port (up to 4096x2160 @ 60Hz).
specs.Expansion and GPU Support: 1 x PCIe x16 5.0 slot for high-performance discrete GPUs (AMD, NVIDIA, Intel).
specs.Crystal Clear Audio: Integrated Realtek ALC897 audio chip with support for simultaneous front/rear audio output. Rear audio ports: LINE IN, LINE OUT, MIC IN. Front audio header for mic and output.
specs.High-Speed Networking: Realtek 8125B/D Gigabit Ethernet (10/100/1000/2500Mbit). Built-in Realtek 8852BE WiFi 6 with Bluetooth 5.2 support. 1 x RJ45 port with Wake-on-LAN and PXE/UEFI boot support.
specs.Ample Storage Options: 2 x M.2 slots supporting PCIe 4.0 x4/x2 SSDs (2242/2280). 2 x SATA 3.0 ports for additional storage devices.
specs.USB Connectivity: Rear: 2 x USB 5G, 4 x USB 2.0. Internal: 1 x USB Type-C 10G, 1 x 2-pin USB 5G, 1 x 2-pin USB 2.0.
specs.Efficient Power Supply: 24-pin ATX main power connector, 8-pin ATX 12V power connector (12V input). Multiple fan headers (2 x system, 1 x CPU) for efficient cooling. Front panel header (F_PANEL) for easy connectivity.
specs.Comprehensive Hardware Monitoring: Voltage, temperature, and fan speed monitoring. Smart fan control for optimized cooling (requires compatible fans).
specs.Broad OS Compatibility: Supports Windows 10/11 64-bit and Ubuntu 64-bit operating systems.
specs.Robust ESD Protection: Air discharge: ± 8KV (C grade), ± 6KV (B grade); Contact discharge: ± 6KV (C grade), ± 3KV (B grade). Tested for proper grounding to ensure stability and reliability.
specs.Additional Features: Rear CLR_CMOS button for easy reset. TPM header for security management. Multiple ARGB and NRGB headers for customizable lighting.

specs.Socket & Processor Support: Compatible with AM5 socket for Ryzen 7000, 8000, and 9000 series processors.
specs.Power Consumption: TDP range from 170W to 230W for optimal power efficiency.
specs.Chipset: AMD® B850 High-Speed Chipset for superior performance and stability.
specs.Memory Capacity: 4 DIMM DDR5 slots, supporting up to 192GB with dual-channel memory and AMD EXPO technology.
specs.Memory Frequency Support: Compatible with DDR5 speeds of up to 7600MHz (OC), with flexibility for overclocking at various frequency levels.
specs.Integrated Graphics: Supports integrated graphics with shared memory, featuring HDMI 1.4 (up to 4096x2160@30Hz) and DP (up to 4096x2160@60Hz).
specs.Expansion Slots: 1 x PCIe 4.0 x16 slot 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4 slot 1 x PCIe 3.0 x1 slot
specs.Audio: Integrated Realtek ALC897 sound with 6 audio outputs, including optical SPDIF_OUT.
specs.Networking: Realtek 8125B/D 10/100/1000/2500Mbit Ethernet Realtek 8852BE Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.2
specs.Storage: 2 x M.2 slots for PCIe X4/X2 SSDs (supports 2280/22110/2280 sizes) 4 x SATA3.0 interfaces for additional storage.
specs.USB Ports: 4 x USB 5G, 4 x USB 2.0, and 1 x USB Type-C (10Gbps) at the rear. 1 x Front USB Type-C (10Gbps) and additional internal USB headers.
specs.Power & Cooling: 24-pin ATX and 8-pin ATX 12V power connectors. 3 system fan headers and 1 CPU fan header for optimal cooling. Smart fan control for automatic fan speed adjustments.
specs.ESD Protection: High-level protection for your components with ±8KV air discharge and ±6KV contact discharge.
specs.Additional Features: CLR_CMOS button, TPM header, and COM_A header for system management and upgrades.
